summary: Python script is high-quality (clear naming, type hints, error handling), but workflow has critical gaps. (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA—security violation. (2) Test cases TC1–TC6 (lines 37–80) are nearly identical repetition; should factor into bash function. (3) Missing test harness script to orchestrate multiple `act push` runs and capture output to required `act-result.txt` artifact. (4) No actionlint validation evidence. Task explicitly requires: `act-result.txt` file existence, separate test harness running `act`, actionlint passing—none delivered. Workflow will execute but maintainability suffers from duplication; adding test case requires editing 6 locations.
